purpose: Surface intrinsic traits via play — curiosity, social style, thinking preference, early motivation. No career prediction.
delivery: Fully gamified narrative; ZERO Likert. Picture forced-choice, revealed-preference exploration, gentle economic & risk games.

blocks.anti_bias: Behaviour, not rating — child can't fake exploring

blocks.adaptive: Eases on 2 errors, no failure framing

blocks.anti_bias: Indirect; social preference revealed by choice
Risk appetite from behaviour, not a question

adaptive_rules.pacing: Auto-pace by engagement speed; narrate all items.
adaptive_rules.no_high_stakes: No scores shown to child; persona output only.
adaptive_rules.wellness: Only severe signals -> counsellor (never the child).

bias_controls.telemetry: Per-item response latency, long-string & answer-change logging on every block.
bias_controls.attention_checks: Embedded attention-check + infrequency items; careless responders flagged.
bias_controls.validity_band: Each report carries a confidence band (high / interpret-with-caution).
bias_controls.scoring: Forced-choice scored with Thurstonian-IRT; behavioural/game scores weighted above self-report; methods fused by confidence, not naive mean.
bias_controls.note: No self-report at all; everything behavioural or forced-choice.

report: Learner persona (avatar + metaphor), strength bars, home+school tips, alert zones, NEP portfolio box.

purpose: Academic behaviour, emerging aptitude, motivation, real learning style, focus/fatigue, decision style.
delivery: Behaviour-first: games + forced-choice + SJTs; minimal Likert; AI-scored short answers.

blocks.anti_bias: Atkinson behavioural achievement motive vs self-report
Measured by performance per format, not faked VARK

adaptive_rules.ai_scored: Short answers scored by Claude Haiku.

bias_controls.telemetry: Per-item response latency, long-string & answer-change logging on every block.
bias_controls.attention_checks: Embedded attention-check + infrequency items; careless responders flagged.
bias_controls.validity_band: Each report carries a confidence band (high / interpret-with-caution).
bias_controls.scoring: Forced-choice scored with Thurstonian-IRT; behavioural/game scores weighted above self-report; methods fused by confidence, not naive mean.

report: Emerging-aptitude radar, learning-format fit, achievement-motive profile, attention/fatigue map, stream-fit predictors, parent summary.

purpose: First high-stakes tool -> ranked STREAM recommendation (PCM/PCB/Commerce/Humanities/Hybrid). Faking pressure is real, so tilt behavioural.
delivery: Adaptive aptitude games + culture-fair items + forced-choice personality + interest sims + validity scale.

bias_controls.telemetry: Per-item response latency, long-string & answer-change logging on every block.
bias_controls.attention_checks: Embedded attention-check + infrequency items; careless responders flagged.
bias_controls.validity_band: Each report carries a confidence band (high / interpret-with-caution).
bias_controls.scoring: Forced-choice scored with Thurstonian-IRT; behavioural/game scores weighted above self-report; methods fused by confidence, not naive mean.
bias_controls.social_desirability: SD scale; if high, lean on game scores & show caution band.

report: Ranked streams, strength-subject map, compatibility chart, mismatch alert, parent guide.

purpose: Full-spectrum map to 20 career domains (4 groups) + fit & next steps. Now incl. communication, EQ, decision, teamwork/conflict, values/meaning.
delivery: Behaviour-first: forced-choice personality, interest sims, domain simulations, economic games, AI-scored reflection. New v3.3 tests delivered as SJTs/sims.

adaptive_rules.session3_routing: Router fires modules by RIASEC top-3 + ability (min 2 T + 3 K + matched M).

bias_controls.telemetry: Per-item response latency, long-string & answer-change logging on every block.
bias_controls.attention_checks: Embedded attention-check + infrequency items; careless responders flagged.
bias_controls.validity_band: Each report carries a confidence band (high / interpret-with-caution).
bias_controls.scoring: Forced-choice scored with Thurstonian-IRT; behavioural/game scores weighted above self-report; methods fused by confidence, not naive mean.
bias_controls.overclaiming: Over-claiming module in knowledge section catches exaggeration.
bias_controls.behaviour_first: Personality/interests/work-readiness delivered as forced-choice/SJT/sim, not Likert.

report: Top-5 domains + fit, full 20-domain matrix, communication/EQ/decision/teamwork scorecard, 'why this fits', next steps, self-awareness quotient.

purpose: Domain fit PLUS employability: communication, negotiation, conflict, teamwork, decision, EQ, learning agility, entrepreneurship, self-concept, work orientation; job vs founder path.
delivery: Simulation-heavy: in-tray, negotiation & team sims, economic games, Trade-off Island, internship evidence; minimal Likert. All new v3.3 tests as sims/SJTs.

blocks.anti_bias: Behaviour in a deal, not self-rating

adaptive_rules.experience_routing: Internship AI tags bias domain firing & feedback.
adaptive_rules.path_branch: Forks into JOB-readiness or ENTREPRENEURSHIP path by behaviour+orientation.
adaptive_rules.shortening: Aptitude shortened where school data imported.
adaptive_rules.ai_scoring: Internship, aspiration, reflection, sims scored by Claude.

bias_controls.telemetry: Per-item response latency, long-string & answer-change logging on every block.
bias_controls.attention_checks: Embedded attention-check + infrequency items; careless responders flagged.
bias_controls.validity_band: Each report carries a confidence band (high / interpret-with-caution).
bias_controls.scoring: Forced-choice scored with Thurstonian-IRT; behavioural/game scores weighted above self-report; methods fused by confidence, not naive mean.
bias_controls.behaviour_first: Most fakeable population -> simulate the most; self-report only for wellness.
bias_controls.evidence_weighting: Internship upload + sims weighted above any remaining self-report.

report: Top domains + role fit, employability scorecard (comm/negotiation/conflict/teamwork/decision/EQ/learning-agility/integrity), adaptability index, job vs entrepreneurship path, next-step plan, wellness note.

purpose: On-the-job readiness for a first role: how they actually behave at work — communication, collaboration, conflict, negotiation, decision-making under ambiguity, EQ, learning agility, integrity, stress, ownership; plus role fit & 30-60-90 plan.
delivery: Simulation-FIRST. A day-in-the-job runs through in-tray, team chat, a tough conversation, a decision under ambiguity, an ethics moment. Self-report only for wellness.

adaptive_rules.role_routing: Resume/role tags + interests fire the relevant domain sims, ICT (T) and knowledge (K) games.
adaptive_rules.path_branch: Outputs an employee-readiness path AND an intrapreneur/entrepreneur signal.
adaptive_rules.difficulty: Per-module easy/standard/stretch; aptitude shortened if UG data imported.
adaptive_rules.ai_scoring: Inbox, messages, negotiation, reflection scored by Claude.

bias_controls.telemetry: Per-item response latency, long-string & answer-change logging on every block.
bias_controls.attention_checks: Embedded attention-check + infrequency items; careless responders flagged.
bias_controls.validity_band: Each report carries a confidence band (high / interpret-with-caution).
bias_controls.scoring: Forced-choice scored with Thurstonian-IRT; behavioural/game scores weighted above self-report; methods fused by confidence, not naive mean.
bias_controls.evidence_weighting: Sim performance + internship evidence dominate the composite.

report: Work-readiness scorecard (communication, collaboration, conflict, negotiation, decision-making, EQ, learning agility, integrity, stress, ownership), role/domain fit, strengths & dev areas, a 30-60-90 day plan, and a job-vs-entrepreneurship signal.
